Package Workout

Class PushUp

  • java.lang.Object
    • Workout.BasicWorkout
      • Workout.PushUp
  • public class PushUp
extends BasicWorkout

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private int repetitions
      the number of pushups performed.

        date, description, duration, energy, intensity

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor Description
      PushUp​(Date date, int repetitions)
      Creates a push up workout on a specified date with a specified number of repetitions.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      int getEnergy()
      the energy burned is estimated to be 5kCal per repetition.
      int getIntensity()
      the intensity is the number of pushups performed or 10 if more than 10 pushups were performed.,

    • Field Detail

      • repetitions

        private int repetitions
        the number of pushups performed. Must be >0

    • Constructor Detail

      • PushUp

        public PushUp​(Date date,
              int repetitions)
        Creates a push up workout on a specified date with a specified number of repetitions.
        Parameters:
        date - the date on which this workout started
        repetitions - the num,ber of repetitions of this push up workout

    • Method Detail

      • getIntensity

        public int getIntensity()
        the intensity is the number of pushups performed or 10 if more than 10 pushups were performed.,
        Overrides:
        getIntensity in class BasicWorkout
        Returns:
        the intensity.

      • getEnergy

        public int getEnergy()
        the energy burned is estimated to be 5kCal per repetition.
        Overrides:
        getEnergy in class BasicWorkout
        Returns:
        the energy in kcal of this workout
